keywords.job: I am just a humble monk. Ask me if you need help or healing.
keywords.name: My name is Cipfried.
keywords.monk: I sacrifice my life to serve the good gods of Tibia.
keywords.tibia: That's where we are. The world of Tibia.
keywords.rookgaard: The gods have chosen this isle as the point of arrival for the newborn souls.
keywords.god: They created Tibia and all life on it. Visit our library and learn about them.
keywords.life: The gods decorated Tibia with various forms of life. Plants, the citizens, and even the monsters.
keywords.plant: Just walk around. You will see grass, trees, and bushes.
keywords.citizen: Only few people live here. Walk around and talk to them.
keywords.obi: He is a local shop owner.
keywords.al: He is a local shop owner.
keywords.dee: He is a local shop owner.
keywords.seymour: Seymour is a loyal follower of the king and responsibe for the academy.
keywords.academy: You should visit Seymour in the academy and ask him about a mission.
keywords.willie: He is a fine farmer. The farm is located to the left of the temple.
keywords.monster: They are a constant threat. Learn to fight by hunting rabbits, deers and sheeps. Then try to fight rats, bugs and perhaps spiders.
keywords.help: First you should try to get some gold and buy better equipment.
keywords.hint: First you should try to get some gold and buy better equipment.
keywords.quest: First you should try to get some gold and buy better equipment.
keywords.task: First you should try to get some gold and buy better equipment.
keywords.what: First you should try to get some gold and buy better equipment.
keywords.do: First you should try to get some gold and buy better equipment.
keywords.gold: You have to slay monsters and take their gold. Or sell food at Willie's farm.
keywords.money: If you need money, you have to slay monsters and take their gold. Look for spiders and rats.
keywords.rat: In the north of this temple you find a sewer grate. Use it to enter the sewers if you feel prepared. Don't forget a torch; you'll need it.
keywords.sewer: In the north of this temple you find a sewer grate. Use it to enter the sewers if you feel prepared. Don't forget a torch; you'll need it.
keywords.equipment: First you need some armor and perhaps a better weapon or a shield. A real adventurer needs a rope, a shovel, and a fishing pole, too.
keywords.fight: Take a weapon in your hand, activate your combat mode, and select a target. After a fight you should eat something to heal your wounds.
keywords.slay: Take a weapon in your hand, activate your combat mode, and select a target. After a fight you should eat something to heal your wounds.
keywords.eat: If you want to heal your wounds you should eat something. Willie sells excellent meals. But if you are very weak, come to me and ask me to heal you.
keywords.food: If you want to heal your wounds you should eat something. Willie sells excellent meals. But if you are very weak, come to me and ask me to heal you.
keywords.heal$: You aren't looking really bad. Sorry, I can't help you.

texts: Hello, ! Feel free to ask me for help.
I am just a humble monk. Ask me if you need help or healing.

greetingPatterns.response: Hello, %N! Feel free to ask me for help.
